command: sudo systemctl stop gitea; sudo sed -i "s/^User=jose/User=git/" /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service; cat /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service | grep User; sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl start gitea && sleep 5 && systemctl is-active gitea && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/v1/version | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("version","?"))" && echo GITEA_FIXED
